rule.name: PS_LetterGenerationAdditionalStyle
rule.definition: joinarray( { /*"div {border: 2px dotted gray}",*/ "#to p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", "#logo {position: absolute; top: 0mm; left: 0mm; height: 20mm}", "#topCenterBox {position: absolute; top: 0mm; left: 65mm; width: 70mm}", "#topCenterBox p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", "#from {position: absolute; top: 30mm; font-size: 8pt; width: 100%}", "#to {position: absolute; top: 40mm}", "#authority {position: absolute; top: 40mm; right: 0mm; font-size: 8pt}", "#identifiers {position: absolute; top: 80mm; width: 100%}", "#identifiers p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", ".identifierHeader {font-size: 8pt}", "#subject {position: absolute; top: 95mm; font-weight: bold; width: 100%}", "#body {font-size: 12pt; margin-top: 105mm; width: 100%}", "#attachments {margin-top: 10mm; width: 100%}", ".lFooter {position: running(leftFooter); font-size: 6pt;}", ".lFooter p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", ".cFooter {position: running(centerFooter); font-size: 6pt;}", ".cFooter p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", ".rFooter {position: running(rightFooter); font-size: 6pt;}", ".rFooter p {margin-top: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em}", "#fundingTable {border: 1px solid black; border-collapse: collapse;}", "#fundingTable th {border: 1px solid black; border-collapse: collapse;}", "#fundingTable td {border: 1px solid black; border-collapse: collapse; padding: 1mm}", "h1 {font-size: 14pt}", "h2 {font-size: 12pt}", }, char(10) )
